arts.ttl: ‘I’ve not put this out anywhere’: Sky journalist shares what he’s now been told about Matt Targett and Leeds
arts.sum: The transfer window closes in a few days’ time, and there are a number of teams that have work to do. Newcastle United may want...

arts.ttl: Cardiff City boss has Leeds United Elland Road theory he thinks will aid promotion rivals
arts.sum: Cardiff City manager Omer Riza has suggested that pressure placed on Leeds United by their own fans could play a role in Saturday’s Championship clash. Leeds themselves are 11 games undefeated in the league and sit top after 29 matches.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveal throws spanner in the works amid Leeds United transfer interest
arts.sum: Leeds United will have to look elsewhere this month if they want to bolster their midfield options with Manchester City midfielder James McAtee set to stay at the Etihad Stadium. The arrival of Omar Marmoush and return of Oscar Bobb will add further competition for places in City's squad for the second half of the season but McAtee looks set to stay at Man City after Pep Guardiola's latest reveal.

arts.ttl: Leeds United in talks with UK club to let defender leave, in final 6 months of ER contract
arts.sum: Leeds United’s U21 centre-back Jeremiah Mullen is in talks with Scottish Championship side Dunfermline Athletic over a loan transfer that would likely end his stay at Elland Road. The YEP have shared this Friday that Leeds are in talks with Scottish Championship side Dunfermline Athletic over sanctioning a loan exit for U21 centre-back Jeremiah Mullen.

arts.ttl: Southampton boss makes new Cameron Archer transfer admission amid Leeds United pursuit
arts.sum: And now Juric says he believes Archer - his club’s top scorer with five goals in 25 matches - will stay at St Mary's beyond transfer deadline day. Leeds boss Daniel Farke has kept the door open for a striker arrival in the final days of the window with Patrick Bamford still sidelined with a hamstring injury and United otherwise being one injury away from having only one fit centre-forward.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: Nigeria international considering move to Elland Road?
arts.sum: Leeds United reportedly emerge as one of the most likely destinations for a Nigeria international ahead of the closure of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Cardiff City
arts.sum: Leeds United host Cardiff City this Saturday looking to get back to winning ways after a draw against Burnley on Monday night. Leeds sit top of the table after 29 games this season, boasting an 11-game unbeaten run under Daniel Farke with the most recent result a 0-0 stalemate at Burnley.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City star joins Bolton on loan after signing new deal
arts.sum: Following the announcement of Callum Robinson, Callum O'Dowda and Jak Alnwick all signing new deals, Etete becomes the fourth player today to commit his long-term future to the club - but will spend the second half of the campaign on loan in a bid for minutes and goals. Kion Etete has completed a loan move to Bolton Wanderers after signing a new two-year extension to his Cardiff City deal.

arts.ttl: Emi Buendia move to Bayer Leverkusen highlights Leeds United transfer problem
arts.sum: “I never comment about players under contract for other teams,” said the Leeds manager. When asked about a potential swoop for Buendia in the days prior to that outing in France, Daniel Farke was hesitant to comment but made clear his admiration for the 28-year-old, with whom he worked at Norwich City.

arts.ttl: Leeds United fired January transfer warning ahead of deadline day after Daniel Farke reminder
arts.sum: Leeds United are in a good position for promotion, with Daniel Farke's side leading the table by 2 points and the club in a'strong' spot with regards to financial regulations - but some fans in the Leeds Live comments section say that the club should turn good bets into sure bets as the end of the transfer window looms. We need to add some depth in this window, there is a bit of truth in Farke's statement that you do not get good players in January, to which I would add, 'particularly when you wait until the end of the window and only get a choice of the dregs!' Another mismanaged window increases the odds of us not making the cut this season."
